sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107438" key="u(pere/kkeimai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερέκ-κειμαι</orth>, <sense id="n107438.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f. l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὕπαρ ἔκκ-</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1066c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
